parameters.content:
### LinkedIn Data Ingestion

This workflow runs periodically to fetch personal LinkedIn Member Data Portability API exports:
- **UGC Posts**: Shared posts and articles authored by you.
- **Comments**: Comments made on posts.
- **Likes**: Reactions (likes, empathy, praise, etc.) on posts.
- **Invitations**: Incoming and outgoing connection requests.
- **Messages**: Conversation inbox history.
- **Connections**: Personal connection and contact history.
- **Following**: Entities, pages, and members followed.
- **Searches**: History of search queries on the platform.

### Official Documentation:
- [LinkedIn Member Data Portability](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/dma/member-data-portability/member-data-portability-member/?view=li-dma-data-portability-2026-05)
- [Member Changelog API](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/dma/member-data-portability/shared/member-changelog-api?view=li-dma-data-portability-2026-05&tabs=http)
- [Member Snapshot API](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/dma/member-data-portability/shared/member-snapshot-api?view=li-dma-data-portability-2026-05&tabs=http)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO s_linkedin.ugc_posts (id, author, content, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, author = EXCLUDED.author
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.all_comments (id, post_id, author, content, published_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  '{{ $json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  NOW(),
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  content = EXCLUDED.content, 
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.all_likes (id, post_id, author, published_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.post_id }}',
  '{{ $json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  NOW(),
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  author = EXCLUDED.author,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.invitations (id, to_name, from_name, direction, inviter_profile_url, invitee_profile_url, message, sent_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.to_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.from_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.direction }}',
  '{{ $json.inviter_profile_url }}',
  '{{ $json.invitee_profile_url }}',
  {{ $json.message ? "'" + $json.message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET message = EXCLUDED.message
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.messages (id, conversation_id, sender_name, recipient_name, sender_profile_url, recipient_profile_urls, subject, content, folder, sent_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.conversation_id }}',
  '{{ $json.sender_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.recipient_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.sender_profile_url }}',
  '{{ $json.recipient_profile_urls }}',
  '{{ $json.subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.folder }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.connections (id, first_name, last_name, profile_url, email_address, company, position, connected_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.first_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.last_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.profile_url }}',
  {{ $json.email_address ? "'" + $json.email_address.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.company.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.position.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.connected_at }}',
  NOW(),
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  position = EXCLUDED.position, 
  company = EXCLUDED.company,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.following (id, entity_name, profile_url, type, followed_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',

  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.searches (id, query_text, searched_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',

  '{{ $json.searched_at }}',
  NOW(),
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.social_action_comments (id, post_id, author, content, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',

VALUES (

RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.all_messages (id, conversation_id, sender_name, recipient_name, sender_profile_url, recipient_profile_urls, subject, content, folder, sent_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',

INSERT INTO s_linkedin.instant_reposts (id, original_post_id, original_author, repost_commentary, reposted_at, updated_at, processed)
